title: helichrysum hilliardiae
intro: Helichrysum hilliardiae, also known as the Eastern Coast Everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly nerolidol and alpha-pinene. These essential oils have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting off infections. Helichrysum hilliardiae is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, offering potential health benefits including reduced oxidative stress, improved skin health, and enhanced immune function.
